# NHS/ICB AI Compliance Attestation Procurement Framework Memo (May 2026)
## Headline Finding
As of May 2026, three NHS/ICB procurement frameworks have cross-voice confirmation of mandatory AI compliance attestations: NHS England’s Digital Health Services Framework (DHSF), NHS Shared Business Services’ Digital Technology Solutions 2 (DTS2), and the Digital Outcomes and Specialist Digital Services (DOSDS) framework, all requiring alignment with the NHS AI Assurance Programme. Conflicting, unsubstantiated claims about additional frameworks (including a misattributed "MEOK MCP" framework, tiered ICB-specific frameworks, and the Health and Social Care Network (HSCN) framework) require immediate verification before procurement planning.

## Specific Actions (This Week)
1. Prioritize onboarding to the three confirmed frameworks by submitting the standard NHS supplier declaration form and initial AI self-attestation aligned to the NHS AI Assurance Programme’s 6 core principles (transparency, accountability, fairness, safety, privacy, robustness) via the official NHS procurement portals.
2. Flag the unsubstantiated "MEOK MCP" framework claim to your NHS procurement liaison immediately to confirm whether this is a valid, active framework or a misattribution of existing low-cost procurement routes for AI compliance
